Identity.Name: StingFunctionCodes
Identity.Definition: Function codes for the sixth segment (FUNC) of the STING 8-segment tag. FUNC narrows the role of an element within its SYS — e.g. an HVAC duct may FUNC=SUP (supply), RET (return), EXH (exhaust), OA (outside air), REL (relief). Codes are namespace-disambiguated where the same letters appear in multiple services (e.g. PWR is electrical-only, never HVAC).

Governance.StandardsBasis: CIBSE Guide A/B/C; Uniclass 2015; STING tag config v5.0 (data/TAG_CONFIG_v5_0_DISC_SYS_FUNC.csv); HTM 02-01 / 03-01 / 06-01 for healthcare functions

Value.Definition: Supply — HVAC supply air, plumbing supply, conditioned air to space.
Return — HVAC return air path back to AHU / FCU.
Exhaust — HVAC exhaust to atmosphere; toilet / kitchen / lab extract.
Outside Air — fresh-air intake to AHU.
Relief — pressure-relief air path (e.g. for positive-pressure rooms shedding excess air).
Ventilation general — natural / mixed-mode ventilation not classified as SUP/RET/EXH/OA.
Heating — generic heating function (water, steam, electric).
Heating Hot Water — primary heating water flow (LPHW/MTHW/HTHW).
Chilled Water — primary cooling water flow.
Cooling — generic cooling function.
Refrigerant — VRF / direct expansion refrigerant lines.
Domestic Cold Water function — distribution to outlets.
Domestic Hot Water flow function.
Domestic Hot Water Return / recirculation per HTM 04-01.
Sanitary — soil and waste discharge.
Storm / rainwater drainage function.
Fuel gas distribution function.
Condensate drainage — from AHUs / FCUs / steam systems.
Power — small-power / final-circuit / sub-main electrical distribution.
Lighting — luminaires, lighting controls, lighting circuits.
Emergency lighting / emergency power circuits.
Uninterruptible Power Supply circuits — instrument loads.
Essential / standby power (generator-backed). HTM 06-01 EES Type B/C use cases.
Fire detection / alarm function — including beacons, sounders, MCPs.
Fire Suppression — sprinkler / mist / gaseous suppression. Distinct from SUP (HVAC supply).
Smoke control — AOV, dampers, pressurisation fans, smoke shaft ventilation.
Data — structured cabling, network outlets.
Voice — telephony / VoIP cabling and handsets.
Audio Visual — AV racks, displays, ceiling speakers (non-PA).
Nurse Call — patient call points, staff response devices, dome lights.
CCTV — video surveillance cameras, recorders, displays.
Access Control — readers, locks, magnetic strikes, intercom doorbells.
Medical Gas Flow — distribution side of piped medical gas (after manifold / VIE).
Medical Gas Reserve — manifold / VIE / cylinder bank upstream of distribution.
Medical Gas Exhaust — AGSS (Anaesthetic Gas Scavenging System) exhaust.
Load-Bearing structural element.
Non-Load-Bearing architectural partition.
Fabric / envelope element (external wall, roof, glazing).
Generic / unclassified function — fallback only.
Unknown / not yet assigned.
Wildcard for routing rules. Never tagged on an element.
